slides.title: Welcome to Antigravity-AI
bullets: Your intelligent assistant that adapts to how you work
18 specialized agents working together seamlessly
Beautiful dashboards that make complex data simple
Your data stays private — always

slides.title: Intuitive Dashboard
bullets: Omni-Dashboard: see all agents at a glance
Real-time stress monitoring adapts notification tone
One-click context refresh for decision support
Dark mode optimized for extended use

slides.title: Your Data is Safe
bullets: PIIMasker: automatic personal data redaction on all outputs
FernetVault: encrypted API key storage
No external data leaves your system unmasked
Compliance-ready audit trails in MASTER_INDEX

slides.title: Emotional Intelligence
bullets: Unified EQ Engine assesses operator stress (0-10)
High stress? Notifications become calming and supportive
Learns your preferences over time
Negative reactions flagged for tone improvement

slides.title: Getting Started
bullets: 1. Launch the Meta App Factory dashboard
2. Review your agent network health
3. Set your notification preferences
4. Let the system work for you
